description: Create a daily GitHub Actions workflow named CentOS System CI that runs installation tests and valgrind tests. The workflow triggers every day at 3 am and on pull requests to the master branch. Use an ubuntu-latest job in a centos:7 container, install git, and set up the environment. Install BioDynaMo, cache pyenv and third-party packages, build BioDynaMo, run notebooks, and execute system tests. Finally, notify Slack with a custom message on success, failure, or cancellation.
